headline: The rule serious landlords use to size up a deal in 10 seconds.
subheadline: Every $100,000 you borrow needs about $1,000 a month in rent to break even. Anything above that is profit in your pocket. It's the same math we run on every file before we ever open the loan estimate.

examples.result: -$1,000/mo (this is why we kick out under-rented properties)
